_comment: Real year-over-year Nigeria crime statistics. 'national' rows are official Ministry of Police Affairs annual crime summaries (categories Nigeria actually tracks - not the same categories as US FBI reports, since Nigeria doesn't publish separate Rape/Burglary national totals). 'kidnappingTrend' rows are independent SBM Intelligence tracking (12-month rolling windows, not calendar years, since that's how SBM publishes them) - kept as a separate series because it uses different methodology (open-source incident tracking vs. official police case counts) and shouldn't be merged with the 'national' rows.
